items.briefing:
SAP Concur has warned of rising fraud targeting Australian finance teams, so staff handling expense claims or payments should be on alert for suspicious requests. Separately, most Australian children under 16 are reportedly still accessing social media despite the federal ban — a reminder that digital safety conversations at home remain important.

Cyber insurers are increasingly adding exclusions to policies even as premiums drop, meaning organisations may have less coverage than they assume. If your RTO holds cyber insurance, it's worth checking what is actually covered.

**Tip:** Review your cyber insurance policy details — don't assume a lower premium means the same level of protection.

featured.title: SAP Concur warns of rising fraud in Australian finance
featured.quote: Australian finance teams losing money to fraud at alarming rates, directly impacting local businesses.
